Shadow FIFO Enable

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x98
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Shadow of FCR[0] (FIFOE) allowing FIFO enable/disable without rewriting FCR. Only present when FIFO_MODE and SHADOW are configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] sfe rw 0x0 SFE

Field Descriptions

sfe - SFE

Shadow FIFO Enable. Enables TX and RX FIFOs. 0=disabled, 1=enabled.
